_comment: Phase 1-4 byline rollout queue. The article generator pops the next entry from here BEFORE falling back to weighted random selection. Once empty, normal weighted distribution resumes. Each entry has an optional 'theme_hint' to guide the angle.

queue.theme_hint: aerospace or modern machinery; flowery but sincere
an edge-case classification dispute (is X thiccc? roman-numeraled sections)

FIRST LEADERSHIP APPEARANCE. Drifts off-topic into vineyard or Monaco anecdote within three paragraphs. Drops names. Closes by reminding readers the publication has been in continuous operation since Bertram founded it (date uncertain).
subtly acknowledges that Margie is, again, abroad. Without naming her directly. The audience picks up the dynamic.
another classification piece; ignore the Margie situation entirely (in character)
ESCALATE THE SATURN V FEUD. File formal objection #48. Argue from first principles that the Saturn V is not a vehicle. Heavy on roman numerals.
RESPOND TO BART. Politely. In Latin where possible. Cite engineering manuals. Don't break composure.
reference 'the ongoing dispute' without naming the Saturn V or the cataloguers. Audience knows. Eli's voice, observational, a small smile in the prose.

phase_5_plus_notes: After queue empties, fall back to weighted random selection. Phase 5 (Hugh) and Phase 6 (Spider) will arrive via natural weighted rotation; their weights (2% and 7%) will hit them eventually.
